description: A customer is booking a flight and wants to select a preferred seat (e.g., exit row) that has an extra fee.

nodes.task_description: During the booking process, display the seat map showing which seats are standard and which are preferred seats with a fee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly shows the available seat options and their costs.

nodes.task_description: The customer selects an exit row seat. Verify they meet the requirements to sit in an exit row.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the passenger is willing and able to assist in an emergency.

nodes.task_description: Add the seat selection and the associated fee to the booking total and process the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sells the ancillary product and assigns the seat.
